title: Toluca, Estado de México — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Toluca, Estado de México: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Toluca is a city in Estado de México with a population of 936,145. High-altitude state capital with a rich industrial history and proximity to Mexico City.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
